gold.title: Animated Testimonials
gold.reason: Full testimonial section with animated card transitions, avatar images, and navigation arrows — production-ready social proof block for any SaaS or business site.

gold.title: Customers Section
gold.reason: Complete customers/social proof section with animated group reveal, logo display, and CTA link — drop-in marketing block for landing pages.

gold.title: Integrations Section
gold.reason: Full-width integrations showcase with real logos, CTA button, and clean layout — essential for SaaS marketing pages communicating ecosystem compatibility.

gold.title: Testimonials Columns
gold.reason: Multi-column scrolling testimonials with Framer Motion animation — visually impressive and immediately deployable as a social proof section.

gold.title: Infinite Slider
gold.reason: Smooth infinite-scroll marquee primitive with configurable speed, gap, and direction — the backbone of logo strips and client carousels used on virtually every SaaS site.

gold.title: Logos 3
gold.reason: Auto-scrolling carousel logo strip built on Embla with shadcn/ui — polished, dependency-light, ready for 'trusted by' sections.

gold.title: Cases with Infinite Scroll
gold.reason: Case study / portfolio carousel with infinite scroll and slide counter — excellent for showcasing client work on agency or SaaS sites.

gold.title: Shuffle Grid
gold.reason: Hero-level two-column section with animated shuffling image grid and headline — visually striking full section ready for landing pages.

silver.title: Logo Carousel
silver.reason: Animated column-based logo carousel with Framer Motion — solid 'trusted by' component, slightly more complex to configure than simpler marquee alternatives.

silver.title: Brands
silver.reason: Responsive brands/logo grid with configurable image height and className props — clean and reusable but less visually dynamic than animated alternatives.

silver.title: Logo Carousel
silver.reason: SVG-based animated logo carousel with column layout — well-built but requires SVG components rather than image URLs, limiting drop-in usability.

silver.title: Retro Testimonial Carousel
silver.reason: Testimonial carousel with retro styling, image lightbox, and nav arrows — unique aesthetic that works for creative or agency sites but too niche for generic SaaS.

silver.title: Marquee
silver.reason: Simple, lightweight marquee utility with pause-on-hover and direction control — useful primitive but requires wrapping with content to become a full section.

silver.title: Stack Feature Section
silver.reason: Tech stack showcase with icon grid and CTA — good for developer-facing products but the hardcoded React/AWS/Docker icons make it somewhat niche.

silver.title: About 3
silver.reason: About section with dual image layout, breakout stat block, and CTA — complete page section but limited specifically to about/team pages.

silver.title: Gallery with image cards
silver.reason: Image carousel gallery with navigation buttons built on shadcn Carousel — polished but more of a gallery utility than a full marketing section.

silver.title: Logo Cloud 4
silver.reason: Infinite slider logo cloud with progressive blur fade effect on edges — visually refined enhancement of the standard logo strip.

silver.title: Avatar Circles
silver.reason: Stacked avatar circles with overflow count badge — useful social proof micro-component for hero sections but needs surrounding context.

silver.title: Interactive Icon Cloud
silver.reason: 3D rotating icon/tech logo cloud — visually impressive but very specific to tech/developer audiences and requires react-icon-cloud dependency.

bronze.title: Animated Tooltip
bronze.reason: Animated avatar tooltip on hover — micro-component useful for team or contributor lists but too small to stand alone as a marketing block.

bronze.title: Glare Card
bronze.reason: Mouse-tracking glare effect card wrapper — a visual effect primitive with no standalone marketing value; must wrap other content.

bronze.title: Email Client Card
bronze.reason: Email client UI card with avatar and motion — highly app-specific component suited only for email or inbox product demos.

bronze.title: Sparkles
bronze.reason: Particle sparkle effect using tsParticles — decorative ambient effect, not a standalone section; depends on heavy particles library.

bronze.title: Project Management Dashboard
bronze.reason: Full project management app UI — too complex and app-specific for a website redesign context; not a marketing block.

bronze.title: Logo Cloud 2
bronze.reason: Static logo grid with plus-icon separators — minimal styling, no animation, very basic compared to other logo section options.

bronze.title: Logo Cloud 3
bronze.reason: Infinite slider logo cloud — functional but thin wrapper around the infinite-slider primitive with little added value.

bronze.title: Spinning Logos
bronze.reason: Circular spinning orbit of Lucide icons — visually gimmicky with hardcoded icons (Facebook, YouTube, Gamepad), not suitable for real client sites.
